name: com.efyv.labybackend
description: Engine-neutral EFYV Labyrinth backend primitives (collections, config/schema data, export, IO, math, memory, models, physics). This directory doubles as a local Unity package: the game project references it from Packages/manifest.json as file:../../EFYV-labybackend/Core and compiles it into the EFYVBackend.Core assembly. The package root is Core (not the repository root) so the sibling Tests directory and its bin/obj build output are never imported by Unity.
